requirement_topic.en: Supplier Registration and Compliance Records - ACMA / EESS Responsible Supplier
requirement_topic.zh: 供应商注册及合规记录 - ACMA / EESS责任供应商
requirement_topic.zht: 供應商註冊及合規記錄 - ACMA / EESS責任供應商

summary.en: Australia places compliance responsibility on the local supplier, importer, manufacturer, or authorised representative who supplies the product in Australia. For ACMA regimes, the supplier must ensure the product complies, keep required records, and apply the RCM before supply. For EESS in-scope electrical equipment, a responsible supplier must be registered on the EESS platform, make required declarations, register higher-risk equipment where required, and ensure RCM marking. These registration and record duties are mandatory when the relevant ACMA or EESS regime applies.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚将合规责任置于在澳大利亚供应产品的本地供应商、进口商、制造商或授权代表。对于ACMA制度，供应商须确保产品合规，保存要求的记录，并在供应前加贴RCM。对于EESS范围内电气设备，责任供应商须在EESS平台注册，作出要求的声明，在要求时注册较高风险设备，并确保RCM标志。适用相关ACMA或EESS制度时，这些注册和记录义务为强制要求。
summary.zht: 澳洲將合規責任置於在澳洲供應產品的本地供應商、進口商、製造商或授權代表。對於ACMA制度，供應商須確保產品合規，保存要求的記錄，並在供應前加貼RCM。對於EESS範圍內電氣設備，責任供應商須在EESS平台註冊，作出要求的聲明，在要求時註冊較高風險設備，並確保RCM標誌。適用相關ACMA或EESS制度時，這些註冊和記錄義務為強制要求。

standards_or_laws: ACMA supplier compliance and RCM labelling requirements - mandatory for covered radiocommunications, EMC, and telecommunications products
EESS responsible supplier registration - mandatory for suppliers of in-scope electrical equipment in participating jurisdictions
AS/NZS 4417 - Regulatory Compliance Mark marking framework (evidence and marking framework, not the market-access law itself)

summary.en: In China, compliance responsibility is typically evidenced through certificate holders, factories, importers, and licence holders under CCC, SRRC, network access, and China RoHS regimes. These roles are not the same as an Australian ACMA supplier or EESS responsible supplier. A China manufacturer that ships to Australia normally needs an Australian importer, distributor, or authorised representative to take local supplier responsibility and maintain records.
summary.zh: 在中国，合规责任通常通过CCC、SRRC、进网许可及中国RoHS制度下的证书持有人、工厂、进口商和许可证持有人体现。这些角色不同于澳大利亚ACMA供应商或EESS责任供应商。向澳大利亚发货的中国制造商通常需要澳大利亚进口商、经销商或授权代表承担本地供应商责任并保存记录。
summary.zht: 在中國，合規責任通常通過CCC、SRRC、進網許可及中國RoHS制度下的證書持有人、工廠、進口商和許可證持有人體現。這些角色不同於澳洲ACMA供應商或EESS責任供應商。向澳洲發貨的中國製造商通常需要澳洲進口商、經銷商或授權代表承擔本地供應商責任並保存記錄。

standards_or_laws: CCC certificate holder and factory inspection framework
SRRC/NRA radio type approval holder framework
China RoHS marking and disclosure obligations

gap.en: The structural gap is the local responsible party. Chinese certificates name Chinese entities and Chinese approvals, but Australian supply requires an Australian-facing compliance owner who can produce records to ACMA or EESS regulators. The supplier must verify product classification, test evidence, declarations, RCM marking, and EESS registration status before first supply. Without the registered responsible supplier and compliance folder, otherwise valid test reports may still be insufficient for Australian market access.
gap.zh: 结构性差距在于本地责任主体。中国证书列明中国实体和中国审批，但澳大利亚供应需要一个面向澳大利亚监管的合规责任主体，能够向ACMA或EESS监管机构提供记录。供应商须在首次供应前核验产品分类、测试证据、声明、RCM标志及EESS注册状态。若没有已注册责任供应商和合规文件夹，即使测试报告本身有效，也可能不足以支持澳大利亚市场准入。
gap.zht: 結構性差距在於本地責任主體。中國證書列明中國實體和中國審批，但澳洲供應需要一個面向澳洲監管的合規責任主體，能夠向ACMA或EESS監管機構提供記錄。供應商須在首次供應前核驗產品分類、測試證據、聲明、RCM標誌及EESS註冊狀態。若沒有已註冊責任供應商和合規文件夾，即使測試報告本身有效，也可能不足以支持澳洲市場准入。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory - supplier record-keeping and RCM obligations under ACMA apply to covered products; EESS responsible supplier registration is mandatory for in-scope electrical equipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where CCC, SRRC, network access, or China RoHS applies, but Chinese certificate holder roles do not substitute for Australian supplier responsibility

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Australian market access depends on a local supplier or responsible supplier maintaining records and applying the RCM, not only on factory test reports. China certificates do not replace ACMA supplier duties or EESS responsible supplier registration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】澳大利亚市场准入取决于本地供应商或责任供应商保存记录并加贴RCM，而不仅是工厂测试报告。中国证书不能替代ACMA供应商义务或EESS责任供应商注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】澳洲市場准入取決於本地供應商或責任供應商保存記錄並加貼RCM，而不僅是工廠測試報告。中國證書不能取代ACMA供應商義務或EESS責任供應商註冊。
